plain.en: Father of mercy, who gave your saint, Bishop Justin, the grace to become all things to all people, in order to preach the good news of the Kingdom, may his intercession help us to preach the Gospel and to bring all peoples to the unity of one faith through our fraternal service. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: Father of mercy, who gave your saint, Bishop Justin,
the grace to become all things to all people,
in order to preach the good news of the Kingdom,
may his intercession help us to preach the Gospel
and to bring all peoples to the unity of one faith
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.
